_comment: BEST-GUESS sample shape for offline development. Replace with a real LearnWorlds 'Get Assessment Responses' payload at milestone 2, then adjust the parser if needed.

blocks.description: What is the primary goal of a balanced scorecard?
blocks.answer: To align business activities to the vision and strategy of the organization.

blocks.description: List two limitations of NPV analysis.
blocks.answer: It is sensitive to the discount rate.

blocks.description: Define the weighted average cost of capital (WACC).
What is the primary goal of a balanced scorecard?
List two limitations of NPV analysis.
blocks.answer: Sensitive to discount rate and assumes reinvestment at that rate.
